description: A FieldEditor component takes an IField of any type and deconstructs it's elements into a list of editor components.

fields._targetField: The field to generate an editor list for.
fields._textEditors: A list of text editors of the specified ``_targetField``'s components.
fields._textDrives: A list of text value fields to drive with the contents of the components of the specified ``_targetField``.

usage: Attach to a slot under a UIX Canvas hiearchy with a RectTransform and then insert an IField into ``_targetField`` to be edited for this component to generate an editor for the elements of the specified ``_targetField``.
